positive: Stylized whimsical depiction of a group of friendly, stylized forest creatures (fox, owl, deer, and bunny) huddled together in a circle, forming a peaceful, interlocking wreath pattern. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for apparel printing, featuring strong, bold silhouettes and clean outlines against a solid, light background. The art style should be inspired by modern, flat Scandinavian design and Japanese woodblock print aesthetic, using a limited color palette of deep teal, sage green, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The lighting should be soft and even, emphasizing the contrasting colors and the clean separation of subjects, suitable for direct screen printing. Minimal background texture.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, dirty, noisy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bokeh, gradient background, complex background, messy, illegible, complex background elements
